# opnsense_dnsmasq_range (Resource)

Manages a Dnsmasq DHCP range on OPNsense. DHCP ranges define address pools and related DHCP behavior for Dnsmasq.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "opnsense_dnsmasq_range" "lan" {
  start_address = "192.0.2.100"
  end_address   = "192.0.2.150"
  domain_type   = "range"
  domain        = "example.com"
  description   = "Example LAN DHCP range"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `start_address` (String) Start address for this DHCP range.

### Optional

- `constructor` (String) Interface constructor for dynamic range generation.
- `description` (String) Description for this DHCP range.
- `domain` (String) Domain for this DHCP range.
- `domain_type` (String) How the DHCP domain is derived.
- `end_address` (String) End address for this DHCP range.
- `interface` (String) Interface this DHCP range applies to; blank means any allowed interface.
- `lease_time` (Number) Lease time for this DHCP range.
- `mode` (Set of String) Range mode flags.
- `no_sync` (Boolean) Exclude this range from HA synchronization.
- `prefix_length` (Number) IPv6 prefix length for this range.
- `ra_interval` (Number) Router advertisement interval.
- `ra_mode` (Set of String) IPv6 router advertisement modes.
- `ra_mtu` (Number) Router advertisement MTU.
- `ra_priority` (String) Router advertisement priority.
- `ra_router_lifetime` (Number) Router advertisement router lifetime.
- `set_tag` (String) DHCP tag to set for leases in this range.
- `subnet_mask` (String) IPv4 subnet mask for this DHCP range.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.

## Import

Import is supported using the Dnsmasq DHCP range UUID from OPNsense.

```shell
terraform import opnsense_dnsmasq_range.lan 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012
```
